---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or behaviour change
title: "[feat]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!-- What limitation or pain point are you trying to solve?
     Quote or paraphrase the workflow that doesn't fit today. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the desired behaviour. Screenshots, mockups, and links to
     similar features in other projects are all welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why did you reject them? -->

## Impact

<!-- Who benefits? Roughly how many users? Is this a one-time change
     or a long-term direction? -->

| Dimension | Notes |
| --------- | ----- |
| Affected components | (e.g. transport / display / daemon / docs) |
| Backwards-compatible? | (yes / no / requires migration) |
| API impact | (none / additive / breaking) |
| Crate impact | (list crate names) |
| Effort estimate | (S / M / L / XL) |

## Open questions

<!-- Anything you'd like feedback on from maintainers or the community
     before you start implementing. -->

## Will you send a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to open a pull request
- [ ] Yes, with help from a maintainer
- [ ] No, just discussing for now
